campaigns.notes: Performed best with diverse creatives and automatic placements; strong for SPF and bundles.
Best CTR and CPA among non-Advantage+ sets; seed from high-LTV purchasers.
Broad Advantage+ Audience did okay; needs stronger hooks for HA.
Top ROAS; frequency started to creep above 3.5; creative fatigue after week 6.
Used to gather watch time/engagement; not optimized for purchases.

observations: Retargeting DPA delivered the highest ROAS but began showing fatigue at frequency > 3.5.
1% high-LTV lookalike outperformed broader audiences on CPA and CTR.
Advantage+ Shopping was reliable for new customer reach; ensure catalog freshness and diverse assets.
Landscape video inventory is limited; vertical assets performed best in Reels/Stories.
recommendations_forward: Scale Advantage+ Shopping with refreshed vertical creatives and catalog updates.
Maintain a dedicated 1% LTV lookalike ad set for control and efficient acquisition.
Keep retargeting windows tight (7d, 14d, 30d tiers) with frequency cap <=3 and exclude recent converters.
Rotate creatives every 10–14 days to prevent fatigue and sustain CTR.
